titleStmt.title: SII 24.366: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 366. (A.R. No. 69 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, CHANDANA-MAṆḌAPA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the grant of the village Uppūr of Mēlaimuṟi in Vaḍagarai Malaināḍu by Pōḷu-Cheṭṭiyār alias Kṛishṇarāya-Nāyakkar, son of Veṅgaḷu-Cheṭṭiyār of Kāñchīpuram towards offerings to god Raṅganātha for the merit of the king. Shares are alloted to feed Śrīvaishṇavas and his (the donor's) gardeners. Also mentions the grant of land in Tirumaṅgalam of Kīḻaimuṟi for special offerings to god at his garden. The details of the date Śaka 1435, Śrīmukha, Vṛiśchika, śu. 12, Friday, Rēvati correspond to A.D. 1513, November 9, Wednesday, (not Friday), f.d.t. ·24; ·84.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti . śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamecuraṉ śrīvīrakṛṣṇarāya mahārāyar piṟutivirācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa śahāptam 1000 4 100 3 10 5ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa śrīmukasamvatsarattu viṟucci
ka nāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu tuvādeśiyum cukkiṟavāramum peṟṟa repatināḷ perumāḷ śrīraṅkanātatevar śrīpaṇṭārattukku kāñcivuram veṅkaḷu ceṭṭiyār puttraṉ polu ceṭṭiyār kṛṣṇarāya nāyakkar
kuṭutta tarmacātaṉa paṭṭaiyam . svāmi kriṣṇarāyamahārāyar taṉmamāka nittiyam nālu taḷikai perumāḷ Amutu ceytaruḷattakkatāka kaṭṭaḷai paṇṇukaiyil Inta nālu taḷikaikkum Amutupaṭi
neyyamutu kaṟiyamutu campāram Uṭpaṭṭa vakaikkuc cetta vaṭakarai maḻaināṭu melaimuṟi Uppūr Ūr Oṉṟukku Arakkuppaṭi tāṉamāniyam nikki niṉṟa naṉcey puṉcey nattam pa
ṭukai māvaṭai māvaṭai maṟṟum poṉ mutal nel mutalukku kūṭum sakalātāyamum Uṭpaṭṭu paṇṭārattile kaṇṭukoṇṭu Inta Avatarak kaṭṭaḷai cantiṟātittavaraiyum naṭakkakaṭavatākavum . I
nta taḷikaikku viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu Orutaḷikaiyile kantāṭai yirāmāṉu Aiyyaṅkār yirāmāṉuja kūṭattil śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷ yamutu ceyyattakkatāka nāṉāḻiprasāda mum nammuṭaiya yiraṇṭu to
ppum payiṟ ceyyiṟa Āḷ Ilakkaikku nāṉāḻi prasādamum naṭakka kaṭavatākavum . Itu niṅkalāka nammuṭaiya toppile perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷukiṟatukku ciṟappuk kaṭṭaḷaikku kiḻai
muṟi tirumaṅkalattile viṭṭa yirāca vipāṭaṉāl nilam veli Inta nilam veliyum cantiṟātittavaraiyum naṭakka kaṭavatākavum .
Digital edition of SII 24.366 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
